title: Job Openings at Novarick Homes and Properties Limited
content:
Novarick Homes and Properties Limited is a real estate development company, dedicated to providing remarkable housing and investment solutions across the real estate spectrum. We pride ourselves with the development of estates that runs on a clean and renewable energy supply, this we believe will help us make considerable impact in making the world around us a better place.

We are recruiting to fill the following positions below:

1.) Construction Project Manager

Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Construction Project Manager will be responsible for planning, coordinating, and executing construction projects from pre-construction through completion.
	The role requires a professional with strong project management discipline, construction expertise, leadership ability, and stakeholder management capability.
	The ideal candidate will ensure that Novarick’s developments are delivered efficiently, safely, and profitably while maintaining strong relationships with contractors, consultants, regulators, and internal teams.


Key Responsibilities
Project Planning & Execution:


	Lead planning and execution of construction projects from design coordination through completion
	Develop project schedules, timelines, and execution strategies
	Coordinate architects, engineers, contractors, and suppliers
	Monitor project milestones and resolve delays


Construction Management:


	Oversee daily construction activities across project sites
	Ensure adherence to construction drawings and specifications
	Manage contractors, subcontractors, and site supervisors
	Conduct regular site inspections and progress reviews


Budget & Cost Control:


	Monitor project budgets and cost performance
	Track cost variations and manage financial risks
	Review contractor claims and payment applications
	Coordinate with finance for project cost reporting


Stakeholder Management:


	Serve as liaison between management, contractors, consultants, and regulators
	Provide regular project updates to leadership
	Coordinate external consultants including architects, engineers, and quantity surveyors


Compliance & Regulatory Management:


	Ensure compliance with building regulations and safety standards
	Coordinate regulatory approvals
	Implement strong health and safety protocols


Risk Management:


	Identify project risks and mitigation strategies
	Resolve design conflicts, contractor disputes, and supply issues
	Maintain proper documentation and governance


Quality Assurance:


	Implement quality control procedures
	Ensure work meets design and engineering standards
	Coordinate project snagging and handover processes


Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)
Project Delivery:


	Percentage of projects delivered on schedule
	Percentage delivered within approved budget


Construction Quality:


	Number of defects or rework incidents
	Quality inspection performance scores


Cost Efficiency:


	Cost variance vs approved project budgets
	Contractor payment and cost management efficiency


Stakeholder Satisfaction:


	Management and internal team feedback
	Consultant and contractor coordination effectiveness


Compliance & Safety:


	Zero major safety incidents
	Full regulatory compliance


Project Reporting:


	Timeliness and accuracy of project reporting


Required Qualifications


	Bachelor’s Degree in Civil Engineering, Construction Management, Architecture or related field
	Minimum of 7+ years of experience managing construction projects
	Proven experience delivering residential or commercial real estate developments
	Strong understanding of construction project management processes
	Experience managing contractors, consultants and site teams
	Strong understanding of construction budgeting and cost control


Preferred Certifications:


	PMP (Project Management Professional)
	PRINCE2
	Certified Construction Manager (CCM)
	NSE membership or COREN registration


Key Skills:


	Project leadership and execution
	Construction operations expertise
	Stakeholder management
	Problem solving and decision making
	Strong communication and reporting


Ideal Candidate:


	Has verifiable project management experience
	Has delivered real estate development projects
	Is organized and execution-focused
	Can manage technical construction details and strategic stakeholder relationships
	Thrives in a fast-growing development environment


Why Join Novarick Homes


	Opportunity to work on high-impact residential developments
	Leadership role overseeing major projects
	Clear career growth path:
	Construction Project Manager → Senior Project Manager → Head of Development / Construction Director.


Application Closing Date
Not Specified.

How to Apply
Interested and qualified candidates should:
Click here to apply online

 

 

2.)  Customer Intelligence and Programs Manager

Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Overview


	The Customer Intelligence & Programs Manager will be responsible for transforming Novarick’s customer database into a strategic growth engine.
	This role focuses on analysing customer data, developing structured investor engagement programs, and implementing initiatives that increase repeat purchases, referrals, and long-term client loyalty.
	The successful candidate will work closely with the Sales, Marketing, and Client Experience teams to develop programs that improve customer lifecycle engagement and generate additional revenue from Novarick’s growing base of property investors.


Key Responsibilities
Customer Data Intelligence:


	Develop and manage a centralized customer data system across all Novarick projects.
	Analyse customer behavior, purchasing patterns, and investment preferences.
	Segment customers into meaningful categories such as investors, diaspora buyers, repeat buyers, and high-net-worth clients.
	Produce periodic customer insights reports to guide management decisions.


Customer Lifecycle Strategy:


	Design customer lifecycle frameworks from initial inquiry to post-purchase engagement.
	Identify opportunities for repeat purchases and property upgrades among existing buyers.
	Develop targeted engagement strategies for different customer segments.


Revenue Expansion Programs:


	Design and implement programs that encourage repeat investment.
	Develop structured referral and ambassador programs for existing clients.
	Support initiatives that promote cross-project investments among Novarick buyers.


Investor Engagement Programs:


	Support the development and management of investor engagement initiatives.
	Assist with investor briefings, customer engagement campaigns, and loyalty initiatives.


CRM & Customer Systems Management:


	Manage and optimize the company’s CRM platform.
	Ensure accurate and organized customer data management.
	Develop dashboards and reports that support sales and marketing performance.


Cross-Team Collaboration:


	Work closely with the Sales team to identify repeat buyer opportunities.
	Provide Marketing with customer insights that improve campaign targeting.
	Collaborate with the Client Experience team to enhance overall customer satisfaction.


Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)
Revenue Impact:


	Percentage of total sales generated from repeat buyers.
	Revenue generated from upsell or upgrade programs.
	Revenue generated through referral programs.


Customer Engagement:


	Customer engagement rate across communication channels.
	Participation rate in investor engagement programs.
	Customer retention and satisfaction metrics.


Data & Insight Quality:


	CRM data accuracy and completeness.
	Quality and usefulness of customer insight reports.
	Adoption of customer insights by Sales and Marketing teams.


Program Implementation:


	Successful launch of new customer engagement initiatives.
	Measurable impact of programs on repeat purchases and referrals.


Requirements


	7–10+ years of experience in customer intelligence, Data Analysis, CRM management, customer success, or program management.
	Strong analytical and data interpretation skills.
	Experience developing customer engagement or loyalty programs.
	Excellent project management and organizational abilities.
	Strong communication and stakeholder management skills.
	Experience working with CRM tools and data dashboards.


Preferred Background
Candidates with experience in the following sectors will have an advantage:


	Real estate
	PropTech
	Financial services
	FinTech
	Customer experience or customer success management.


Click here to apply online

 

3.) Senior Property Investment Advisor

Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Summary


	The Senior Property Investment Advisor (Capital & Investment Strategy) will play a strategic role in helping Novarick structure and raise capital for its real estate projects and investment products.
	The role combines investment advisory, capital raising, product structuring, and thought leadership.
	The candidate will help design real estate investment offerings, prepare investor proposals, engage institutional investors, and educate the market through high-quality investment content.
	This role is suited for professionals with backgrounds in investment banking, wealth management, private equity, asset management, or corporate finance.


Strategic Impact of the Role:


	The Senior Property Investment Advisor will play a central role in positioning Novarick as a real estate investment platform rather than a traditional developer.
	By structuring compelling investment opportunities and attracting investor capital, this role will help accelerate Novarick’s development pipeline and expand its investor ecosystem.


Core Responsibilities


	Advise clients on real estate investment opportunities within Novarick’s portfolio
	Source and manage relationships with high?net?worth individuals, diaspora investors, and institutional investors
	Lead capital raising initiatives for Novarick development projects and investment products
	Structure property investment products and investment strategies
	Develop compelling investment proposals and investor pitch materials
	Present and defend investment proposals to potential investors and institutions
	Collaborate with management on capital strategy for development projects
	Support development of structured products such as property investment funds or special investment opportunities
	Build and maintain a pipeline of qualified investors
	Work closely with the sales and development teams to close investment transactions


Institutional Capital & Strategic Responsibilities:


	The role will also involve engaging institutional investors and capital partners.
	Identifying potential institutional investors including asset managers, family offices, investment funds, and private banks
	Structuring institutional investment opportunities in Novarick projects
	Preparing investment memoranda and financial models for capital raises
	Leading investor meetings and capital raise presentations
	Helping design long-term capital strategies for Novarick’s growth
	Content Creation & Thought Leadership
	Candidates must actively contribute to Novarick’s thought leadership strategy.


Other Responsibilities include:


	Creating investment-focused content for LinkedIn and other platforms
	Participating in educational videos or webinars explaining real estate investment
	Writing insights on property investment trends
	Translating complex financial concepts into simple investor education content
	Supporting the development of investor reports, guides, and market insights


Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)


	Total capital raised from property investments and structured deals
	Number of new investors or institutions onboarded
	Value of closed investment transactions
	Quality and effectiveness of investment proposals produced
	Pipeline of qualified investors and capital partners
	Contribution to investor education content and thought leadership


Requirements


	5–10+ years of experience in investment banking, asset management, private equity, wealth management, or corporate finance
	Strong understanding of investment principles including ROI, yield, portfolio diversification, and capital structuring
	Experience preparing and presenting investment proposals
	Strong analytical and financial modeling capability
	Excellent communication, presentation, and negotiation skills
	Ability to explain complex investment concepts clearly to investors


Preferred Qualifications:


	MBA, CFA, or advanced degree in finance or economics
	Experience raising capital for projects or investment funds
	Experience working with high?net?worth or institutional investors
	Experience in real estate investment analysis or development finance


Click here to apply online    

    

        Click here to Apply
